title: Zcash Foundation releases first stable, audited version of Zebra

contentSnippet: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) has long remained at the margins of the evidence base for the cardiovascular benefits of blood-pressure lowering. title: [World Report] New Government aims to revitalise health in Hungary
contentSnippet: The Tisza Party promises to increase investment, rejuvenate public health, and address staff dissatisfaction. Ed Holt reports.

title: Grim theory as bones found on Aussie island

title: Russian authorities detain suspect over St. Petersburg cafe blast
Indians forced to return home as Iran war rocks Gulf economy
contentSnippet: The Iran war has forced thousands of Indian workers to leave their jobs in Gulf nations and return home. Their future remains unclear, and now India itself is feeling the economic impact.
